title: balance_with_confirmations doc claims no interleaved writes but that is false
description: balance_with_confirmations() doc says 'Uses the single-connection pool so both queries run on the same connection with no interleaved writes'. With max_connections=1, the async executor can still schedule the background scanner task between the scan_tip() await and the balance() await, allowing save_block_state to advance the tip and add new notes between the two reads. The guarantee is false: the two queries are not atomic. Fix: either run both queries inside a single SQLite transaction, or correct the doc to say 'the two calls are not atomic and the scanner may advance between them'.
